title: Gene selection for studying frugivore-plant interactions: a review and pipe-line case study using Queensland fruit fly in tomato
author: Shirin Roohigohar
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Mean qPCR primer check results and errors of primer pairs with and without  Bactrocera tryoni  larval tissue cDNA or tomato fruit tissue cDNA. 

 Two technical replications were carried out and the cycle quantification analysis was done in LightCycler®96, version 1.1.0.1320, Roche.
steps_raw:
Mean qPCR primer check results and errors of primer pairs with and without  Bactrocera tryoni  larval tissue cDNA or tomato fruit tissue cDNA. 

 Two technical replications were carried out and the cycle quantification analysis was done in LightCycler®96, version 1.1.0.1320, Roche.
